name: universal-re-skill
description: Universal reverse engineering and vulnerability detection for Android, iOS, Windows PE, Linux ELF, macOS Mach-O, .NET, and more. Supports Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Aider, Continue, Windsurf, and Amazon Q.

metadata.description: Universal binary reverse engineering and source vulnerability scanning skill

plugins.name: universal-reverse-engineering
plugins.description: Reverse engineer Android APK/XAPK, iOS IPA, Windows PE/EXE/DLL, Linux ELF, macOS Mach-O, and .NET assemblies. Auto-detect file type, decompile/disassemble, extract strings, trace call flows, and document APIs.
